name: Amazement Assistant Delia
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>驚楽園の助手</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>アメイズメント・アシスタント</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> ＜<ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｄｅｌｉａ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ディライア</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>＞
desc: You can reveal 1 "Attraction" Trap in your hand; Special Summon this card from your hand. You can send 1 "Attraction" Trap from your hand or face-up field to the GY; Set 1 "Attraction" Trap directly from your Deck to your Spell & Trap Zone. You can only use each effect of "Amazement Assistant Delia" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can reveal 1 "Attraction" Trap in your hand; Special Summon this card from your hand.
